Scope: most Keycloak operations; audit log access; OpenSearch queries; ticket workflows; cross-realm operations with CR ticket reference. Out of scope: hard-deleting users (use disable + 90-day flow); self-grants (separation of duties); realm-admin grants without dual-control + open CR.
